1.note: As in Syriac version; Hebrew reads I.

3.anchor: But the righteous will live by their faithfulness to God.
3.note: Greek version reads If the vision is delayed, wait patiently, / for it will surely come and not delay. / I will take no pleasure in anyone who turns away. / But the righteous person will live by my faith.

5.note: As in Dead Sea Scroll 1QpHab; other Hebrew manuscripts read Wine.

5.anchor: They open their mouths as wide as the grave,

16.note: Dead Sea Scrolls and Greek and Syriac versions read and stagger!

1.anchor: This prayer was sung by the prophet Habakkuk

3.anchor: I see God moving across the deserts from Edom,
the Holy One coming from Mount Paran.

6.note: Or The ancient paths belong to him.

16.anchor: My legs gave way beneath me,

19.anchor: He makes me as surefooted as a deer,
19.note: Or He gives me the speed of a deer.

5.note: Greek version reads Look, you mockers; / look and be amazed and die.

6.anchor: I am raising up the Babylonians,

8.anchor: Their horses are swifter than cheetahs
